message:
feat(style): improve ergonomics with generic color conversion

Style API improvements:

Style::fg() and Style::bg() now accept generic types:
- Changed signature from `fn fg(self, color: PackedRgba)` to
  `fn fg<C: Into<PackedRgba>>(self, color: C)`
- Enables passing any type that implements Into<PackedRgba>
- Removes need for explicit .into() calls at call sites
- Trade-off: methods are no longer const fn (acceptable for builder pattern)

Form widget setter methods:
- Add set_style(), set_label_style(), set_focused_style(), set_error_style()
- These mutation methods complement the existing builder methods
- Useful for runtime theme switching where forms need style updates
  without reconstructing the entire form

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
